title: Salesperson's hastiness results in unwanted credit card for customer
summary: An individual complained that a retail store inappropriately collected her personal information and disclosed it to a financial institution. She also complained that the financial institution used her personal information, and disclosed it to unauthorized organizations, without her consent.
